name: Zucchini Dill Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a medium-sized saucepan of water to boiling.
2. Scrub the zucchini, trim it, and cut it crosswise into half pieces.
3. Cut each half into 8 wedges.
4. Salt the boiling water.
5. Add the zucchini and boil just until tender, about 4 minutes.
6. Drain well.
7. Process the zucchini, buttermilk, dill, and nutmeg in a blender until smooth.
8. Thin the sauce with enough broth to make it pourable.
9. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
10. Serve warm with poached fish or steamed vegetables.
